title: Harrisia eriophora
taxonomy: Harrisia eriophora is classified as a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is a genus of cacti that are primarily found in the subtropical regions of Central and South America. The family Cactaceae is part of the order Caryophyllales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes succulents and other cacti. The order Caryophyllales is within the class Magnoliopsida, also known as flowering plants. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic relationships.
